page_content:
Formerly: EDUC498I.

Additional Information: This is a 3-week living-learning study abroad experience in the Netherlands, Germany and Belgium. The course is offered through the Education Abroad office. Prospective students must complete the MYEA application. Myea.umd.edu.

EDUC478 Using Information Technology in Schools (1-3 Credits) Strategies, resources, tools and organizational concepts for using technology to facilitate classroom learning and school administrative functions.
